name: InboxSentinel — Gmail Subscription Auditor
description: Audit your subscriptions, mass unsubscribe, zero server. No OAuth — reads DOM only.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://www.google.com https://t0.gstatic.com https://t1.gstatic.com https://t2.gstatic.com https://t3.gstatic.com
